reviews.review_title: This is what the Oculus go is for.
reviews.review_description: Unreal, I love it. I fly about every sim I can get my hands on. I also have a few hundred hours logged in a single engine Cessna. Yes this is far from a detailed sim but in VR, sim mode with full immersion you will get that little stomach tingle you should. I can't recommend this more. 5 stars.

I wasn’t sure if this would work well with the Go controller but no issues so far. Flying isn’t too hard and some of the missions are challenging. 
Would be nice to find a written manual to make it easier to understand how to advance.

this is a very realistic and fun flight sim. if you have any questions or issues the developers actually email you back very quickly. lots of cool planes and the graphics are outstanding! plus if you are hungover there are multiple comfort modes so you don't have to puke all over and embarrass yourself.
Best game for the oculus go I have tried yet!

as others have said the game won’t throttle properly.   The touch pad with this game does not understand when you are pushing up and down to throttle. It works intermittently at best.  The game is unplayable.   I’ve unpaired and repaired the controller but still no luck.    And developers please don’t comment on this review and write “hold up on the touch pad”.   That’s common sense and it’s not working.   Reading the one star reviews you can see many people have complained about this.

developer_response.body: We changed how throttle works now.  You can just slide up / down on the trackpad to control the throttle.

reviews.review_description: Maybe as you progress the plane goes faster?  I have not played a whole lot, about an hour, but it's very boring and the plane is just to slow.  If the next planes that I see in preview are faster, I will probably give this 5 stars.

reviews.review_title: Best Program on my Oculus to Date
reviews.review_description: Not a lot I can say that hasn’t already been said. This sim is an amazing achievement from the developers, and has motivated me to finally begin looking into real-world flight training. This program was exactly what I was looking for in VR. I have a lot of other programs for my Oculus Go, but this one is the only one that truly makes me feel like I am somewhere else doing something amazing. This program will never leave my headset and will definitely be my go to program for demonstrating VR. The only slight gripe I have is with the throttle control. While I never have problems reducing throttle, acceleration sometimes presents a problem. This is definitely an issue with the control, and not with my ability to use it. Great job overall everyone, and thanks so much for this fantastic program.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the positive review.  We just put out an update last week that fixes the throttle issue some were having.  Now just slide up / down on the trackpad to control it.

reviews.review_description: First game I got for the oculus go. It is a whole lot of fun and I hope they release more games like this.
The mechanics and physics on this game are great. However the missions could be a little bit more exciting and have more modes and/or ways to play.
Makes me sick.

Great flight model and graphics. Reading the other reviews it is very frustrating that the programming team has not fixed the hand controller for the oculus go throttle. This would be a five star game if the throttle worked. Kind of important in a flight simulator. Please fix

developer_response.body: We changed how throttle works now.  You can just slide up / down on the trackpad to control the throttle.

reviews.review_title: GREAT FIRST PURCHASE FOR FLYING GAME
reviews.review_description: Mechanics are excellent! I was flying the jet-powered glider and I attempted a barrel roll, and it felt so real I had to put the game down after I felt sick hahah! Any way wicked nice game and thanks having me on here! It’s been cool!

reviews.review_title: Its great but there’s an issue
reviews.review_description:
I’ve been playing Ultrawings on the PSVR for awhile, and this is an excellent little port of the full console version.  Use head tracking to select things instead of your hands, and a little downgrade of the graphics (I don’t notice any other planes in the sky with me)

But sometimes it will just seemingly at random reset the money in your bank like it didn’t save the last mission or two, but you won’t be able to go back and do the mission.  This is a serious bug that will prevent progression as you will not be able to acquire money to buy new airports and planes.   Would gladly rate 5 stars but for that problem.

This game is absolutely essential to get the full vr expereance. You can feel the love and care the developers put into this game. Every session I am glues to my seat because of how addicting this game is. The gameplay is amazing and responsive. I love the skill curve of the planes, especially on your second air craft, it controls and responds to different conditions so incredibly different than your first plane.

Great game you really get a sence of flight. Omg when you do rolls or loops you do feel it in the guts lol Luckily I don't get sick but I can feel why people do. It is scary stuff that dose make your stomach drop at times I wouldn't have it any other way though.
It was Really good and fun

As a real life pilot, all I can say is this game is a ton of fun. You have the sensation of real flight and altitude, yet it’s colorful and cartoonish. The airplane is slightly technical and mechanical, yet not very complicated. Just flying over the airport, turning off the engine and trying to glide to safety on the runway is fun enough for me!
Can’t install at all
The physics are great and the graphics are also very good for the aesthetic they try to achieve. My only complaint is that I wish there were more planes.
Definitely didn’t disappoint, great game👍🏻
